{# contact_nudges.html — Nudge suggestions for dormant vendor contacts. Receives: nudges (list[VendorContact]), vendor (VendorCard). Called by: htmx_views.py vendor_contact_nudges route. Depends on: Tailwind CSS with brand palette. #}

Contact Nudges

({{ nudges|length }} dormant)
{% if nudges %}
{% for c in nudges %}

{{ c.full_name or c.email or '—' }}

{% if c.last_interaction_at %} Last contacted {{ c.last_interaction_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y') }} {% else %} Never contacted {% endif %}

{% if c.email %} Send Email {% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% else %}

All contacts have been contacted within the last 30 days.

{% endif %}
